zh.lifeSummary: 當Christy Morgan於大約1364年出生在義大利時，她的父親Morgan ap Gronwy26歲，母親Miss ferch Richard22歲。她和Thomas ap Lewys至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於大約1464年在她的家鄉享年102歲，埋葬在義大利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christy Morgan于大约1364年出生在意大利时，她的父亲Morgan ap Gronwy26岁，母亲Miss ferch Richard22岁。她和Thomas ap Lewys至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于大约1464年在她的家乡享年102岁，埋葬在意大利。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Christy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Christie .  In the British Isles this is a predominantly masculine form, but in the United States it is more frequent as a girl's name.

en.lifeSummary: When Christy Morgan was born about 1364, in Italy, her father, Morgan ap Gronwy, was 26 and her mother, Miss ferch Richard, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Thomas ap Lewys. She died about 1464, in her hometown, at the age of 102, and was buried in Italy.

fr.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavenny, Monmouths: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christy Morgan est née environ 1364, à Italie, son père, Morgan ap Gronwy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Miss ferch Richard, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Thomas ap Lewys. Elle est décédée environ 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 102 ans, et a été enterrée à Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christy Morgan um 1364 in Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Morgan ap Gronwy 26 und ihre Mutter Miss ferch Richard 22. Sie hatte mit Thomas ap Lewys mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1464 im Alter von 102 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Italien begraben.

ht.Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom: Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christy Morgan è nata il circa 1364 nel Italia, sua padre, Morgan ap Gronwy, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Miss ferch Richard, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Thomas ap Lewys. Morì circa 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 102 anni, e fu sepolta a Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Christy Morganが約1364年にイタリアで生まれた時，父Morgan ap Gronwyは26歳，母Miss ferch Richardは22歳であった。彼女はThomas ap Lewysとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1464年に故郷で102歳で死去し，イタリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christy Morgan(이)가 대략 1364년 이탈리아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgan ap Gronwy(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Miss ferch Richard(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Thomas ap Lewys(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1464년 그녀의 고향에서 102세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christy Morgan nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Itália, seu pai, Morgan ap Gronwy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Miss ferch Richard, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Thomas ap Lewys. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 102 anos, e foi sepultada em Itália.

ro.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavenny, Monmouths: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christy Morgan родилась около 1364 г. в местности Италия, её отцу по имени Morgan ap Gronwy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss ferch Richard, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Thomas ap Lewys. Она умерла около 1464 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 102 лет и была похоронена в местности Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christy Morgan nació aproximadamente 1364, en Italia, su papá, Morgan ap Gronwy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Miss ferch Richard, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Thomas ap Lewys. Murió aproximadamente 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 102 años, y fue sepultada en Italia.
